description:
## The change

Pin the new equivalences in tests; sweep up stale comments left over
from fz-s9y and from BasicBits::NIL/BOOL removal.

### Add pinning tests (ir_codegen::tests)

  `nil_keyword_equals_atom_nil`:
    fn main() do
      if nil == :nil, do: 1, else: 0
    end
    expected halt: 1

  `true_keyword_equals_atom_true`:
    Symmetric for `true == :true`.

  `false_keyword_equals_atom_false`:
    Symmetric.

  `empty_list_does_not_equal_nil_atom`:
    fn main() do
      if [] == nil, do: 1, else: 0
    end
    expected halt: 0     # preserves fz-s9y

  `print_renders_reserved_atoms_without_colon`:
    A capture_main test confirming that print of `:nil`/`:true`/
    `:false` (atom-literal source) renders bareword.

### Add fixture

  fixtures/reserved_atom_keywords_equivalence/
    input.fz exercising `nil == :nil`, `true == :true`, etc.
    expected.txt pinning the equivalence.

### Sweep

  src/ir_typer.rs:22 — the stale comment "ListTail types the tail
    as the list shape itself (possibly empty -> list_of(elem) ∪
    nil; we union with nil)". This was the lurker noted in the
    post-fz-s9y audit. Remove the `∪ nil` claim.

  Grep for any remaining "treats X as Y" prose that's stale after
  NA.1-NA.3:
    - "contains nil" (already updated in fz-s9y.4 — re-check)
    - "BOOL basic bit" / "NIL basic bit"
    - "TAG_SPECIAL"
    - "SPECIAL_NIL" / "SPECIAL_TRUE" / "SPECIAL_FALSE"
  Update or remove each.

### Audit

  Grep for any remaining special-case branches in lattice ops,
  codegen, or pattern matching that referenced the basic-bit
  versions. Remove or rewrite.

## Removes

  - Stale ir_typer.rs:22 comment.
  - Whatever else the audit surfaces.

## Depends on

NA.3.
title: fz-NA.4: pinning tests + stale-comment sweep
